title: Receptor
description: Base ascription schema for Receptor ElementDefinitions. A Receptor is an input port of a Mechanism, derived by the definition-manager from the Mechanism operation's AST (e.g., on("Archetype") triggers and response expectations). It references the owning Mechanism and the Artifact definition that types the received data. Tenant-defined archetypes MUST NOT extend Receptor.

mechanismId.description: Identifier of the owning Mechanism (typically the Mechanism ElementDefinition's elementId).

artifactId.description: Identifier of the Artifact ElementDefinition that types the Receptor's input payload.

interfaceId.description: Optional identifier of the Interface ElementDefinition that exposes this Receptor for inter-Structure coupling. Null means the port is private to the Structure.
